description: Perform an anchor text profile audit for https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the 'All Inlinks' data to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Analyze the data and write a report to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/anchor_text_report.txt. The report must include the total number of links analyzed, counts of links with empty/generic anchor text, and at least 2 specific recommendations for improvement.
